home.title: Experiment Controller
home.subtitle: Stress Detection Study
home.description: Interactive experiment orchestrator for early stress detection research using Samsung Galaxy Watch (PPG) + Polar H10 (ECG).

consent.title: Welcome to the Study
consent.p1: Thank you for participating in this early stress detection research study. During this session, you will complete a 5-minute relaxation phase followed by a 5-minute mental arithmetic task.
consent.p2: Your physiological signals will be recorded by the wearable devices you are wearing (Samsung Galaxy Watch and Polar H10). This web application manages the experiment timeline only — it does not access your device data directly.
consent.p3: All data collected is pseudonymous. No personally identifiable information is stored.
consent.agree: I have read and understood the study information above. I agree to participate in this session.

session.codePrompt: Enter the code provided by your researcher.

deviceCheck.title: Device Check
deviceCheck.subtitle: Please confirm that your wearable devices are ready.
deviceCheck.galaxyWatchDesc: PPG sensor on your wrist — HR monitoring app is running
deviceCheck.polarH10Desc: ECG chest strap is secured and connected

relaxation.title: Relaxation Phase
relaxation.subtitle: Follow the breathing circle. Inhale… hold… exhale… hold…
relaxation.instruction: Follow the breathing pattern. Inhale, hold, exhale, hold. The next phase will begin automatically.

routine.title: Routine Phase
routine.subtitle: Take a short break. Record any observations before the task phase begins.

stress.title: Mental Arithmetic
stress.subtitle: Solve the problems as quickly and accurately as possible.

complete.title: Session Complete!
complete.subtitle: Thank you for participating in this study. Your data has been recorded successfully.
complete.removeDevices: You may now remove your devices. Please inform the researcher that your session is complete.

skip.title: Skip Phase?
skip.message: Are you sure you want to skip the {phase} phase? This action will be logged.

export.title: Data Export
export.subtitle: Enter the admin key to access CSV exports.
export.invalidKey: Invalid admin key. Please try again.
export.serverError: Cannot reach the backend. Is the server running?
export.dashboardSubtitle: Export participant phase timestamps as CSV.
export.noData: No participant data found. Complete a session to see data here.
export.csvNote: CSV: participant_code, phase (Relax / Routine / Task), start_timestamp, end_timestamp (ISO 8601 WIB), date (dd/MM/yyyy).
export.dataNote: All data is pseudonymous — no PII is exported.
export.noPhaseData: No phase data for this participant.
